analysis: The project is a static website focused on black holes with a dark cosmic theme. The current state shows incomplete CSS animations, missing interactive elements, and unhandled JavaScript functionality. The HTML structure needs completion with sections on black holes, and the CSS requires full implementation of cosmic animations and black hole visual effects.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS with dark cosmic theme, black hole animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements for a fully immersive visual experience.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon and ensure all sections (main content with interactive planets, animated slides, and black hole-related content) are properly included.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function, implement mobile menu toggle functionality with smooth transitions, and ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality.
